title: -buildmode=pie is not supported for some arch
body:
Signed-off-by: Xiaodong Liu <liuxiaodong@loongson.cn>

I build skopeo on mips64le with error:
`-buildmode=pie not supported on linux/mips64le`
There are the same issue on other cpu arch. 
reference: https://github.com/containerd/containerd/blob/master/Makefile.linux#L23

comments.body:
LGTM.

Mirek, it looks ok to me when it just excludes the unsupported arches and makes PIE default for others.

The fedora packaging team seems to be dead, see my PR here which is stale: https://pagure.io/packaging-committee/pull-request/1014
